project.name: SyncLite
project.description: SyncLite is an open-source platform that simplifies real-time data synchronization and consolidation. It enables applications to replicate data from embedded and edge databases to analytical databases and data lakes using a lightweight, configuration-driven approach.

purpose: Develop new source and destination connectors
Advance the Open Replication Format ecosystem
Support community contributions and issue triage
funding.why: SyncLite aims to make data synchronization as simple and ubiquitous as SQLite made embedded databases. Funding helps sustain full-time development, improve reliability, expand platform support, grow the open-source ecosystem, and keep the project free and vendor-neutral.
